//: Config for the /lodestar skill (this file lives beside SKILL.md in .claude/skills/lodestar/). Its PATHS are relative to the WORKSPACE root — the dir holding .claude/ + wiki/ — so they travel across machines/clones.
_codeRepos_note: The workspace's code repo(s). MONOLITH ⇒ one entry. MICROSERVICES (multi-repo) ⇒ one entry PER service repo, and each becomes a service in the partition. /lodestar reads them all via .claude/lib/aggregate-graphs.mjs (per-repo staleness + layers). Run /understand on each repo so every one has a graph.
_topology_note: monolith | microservices. monolith ⇒ file→capability tags only (the shared compiler + test suite are the cross-module propagation net). microservices ⇒ also a service partition + cross-service contracts.
_capabilitySource_note: graph-tags = derive a small controlled capability vocab from the graph's per-file tags (seed with: node .claude/skills/lodestar/query-graph.mjs node-tags <graph.json>). subsystem-pages = the wiki is already code-shaped (one page per module), reuse the subsystem slugs as capability tags.
_featureSources_note: Authoritative sources of user-facing features + their status (status docs, user stories, roadmap, README, backlog). The feature-mapper agent reads these to draft the feature register.
_services_note: (microservices only) graph layers grouped into deployable/process units: { name, language, layers:[<graph layer names>] }. Different languages ⇒ no shared compiler ⇒ cross-service contracts matter most.
_contracts_note: (microservices only) the un-greppable cross-service edges: { name, between:[svcA,svcB], files:[<seam files>], checkedBy:[<contract tests>], note }. Wire protocols, API/event schemas (OpenAPI/proto/GraphQL), IPC bridges, deploy/compose manifests. Source from the contract files, NOT the code graph (services don't import each other).
